subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Be thou assured in thine own self through the grace and mercy of God, and cast behind thee those who have disbelieved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد ان اطمئن فی نفسک بفضل الله و رحمته و دع عن ورائک الذینهم کفروا و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort
